# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Authentication Plugin
Description: A simple WordPress user authentication plugin with password hashing.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

// Register a new user
function register_user($username, $password) {
    $hashed_password = password_hash($password, PASSWORD_DEFAULT);
    // Insert the new user into your database using wpdb->insert() or similar function
}

// Authenticate a user
function authenticate_user($username, $password) {
    global $wpdb;
    $row = $wpdb->get_row("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}users WHERE user_login = '$username'");
    
    if ($row && password_verify($password, $row->user_pass)) {
        return true; // Authentication successful
    } else {
        return false; // Invalid username or password
    }
}

// Hook into WordPress actions for user registration and authentication
add_action('init', 'register_new_user');
function register_new_user() {
    if (isset($_POST['username']) && isset($_POST['password'])) {
        register_user(sanitize_text_field($_POST['username']), sanitize_text_field($_POST['password']));
    }
}
add_action('init', 'authenticate_existing_user');
function authenticate_existing_user() {
    if (isset($_POST['username']) && isset($_POST['password'])) {
        if (authenticate_user(sanitize_text_field($_POST['username']), sanitize_text_field($_POST['password']))) {
            // Authentication successful, do something here like redirect to a dashboard page
        } else {
            // Invalid username or password, handle this error accordingly
        }
    }
}
?>
